#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder*\

## `echodeps`: Echoverse module: Create package dependency graphs.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `echodeps`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echodeps")
library(echodeps)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/articles/echodeps)

Sinai](https://icahn.mssm.edu/about/departments-offices/neuroscience)

# Package index

## Dependency graphs

Build and visualise package dependency graphs

- [`dep_graph()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/dep_graph.md)
  : Dependency graph plot
- [`dep_graph_create()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/dep_graph_create.md)
  : Create a dependency graph
- [`dep_graph_create_github()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/dep_graph_create_github.md)
  : Create a dependency graph: GitHub
- [`dep_graph_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/dep_graph_plot.md)
  : Dependency graph plot
- [`revdep_graph_create()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/revdep_graph_create.md)
  : Create a reverse dependency graph

## Graph manipulation

Layout, merge, and subset dependency graphs

- [`layout_igraph()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/layout_igraph.md)
  :

  igraph layout

- [`layout_star()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/layout_star.md)
  : Star layout

- [`merge_graphs()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/merge_graphs.md)
  : Merge graphs

- [`recursive_graph_join()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/recursive_graph_join.md)
  :

  Recursively join a list of
  [tbl_graph](https://tidygraph.data-imaginist.com/reference/tbl_graph.html)s

- [`subset_graph()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/subset_graph.md)
  : Subset graph

## Package metadata

Retrieve and organise package metadata

- [`package_metadata()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/package_metadata.md)
  : Gather package metadata
- [`is_r_package()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/is_r_package.md)
  : Is R package

## Utilities

Colour palettes, format conversion, and publishing helpers

- [`construct_colors()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/construct_colors.md)
  : Construct colors
- [`example_graphs()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/example_graphs.md)
  : Example graphs
- [`html_to_png()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/html_to_png.md)
  : HTML to PNG
- [`visnet_save()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/visnet_save.md)
  : visNetwork save
- [`add_ghpages()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echodeps/reference/add_ghpages.md)
  : Add GitHub Pages metadata
